column1: # baseline_ms captured on the m8-benchmark CI job's own ubuntu-latest runner,
# workflow run 28676356124 (PR #24, binary-search name lookups + the #18
# GOCACHE pre-warm). keel_check and keel_build_cold are inside their KDR-0019
# budget_ms, so --enforce is on in CI: it fails a PR that exceeds budget_ms or
# regresses >5% over baseline_ms. keel_build_incremental remains over budget
# and is a documented --known-gap (fresh Salsa database per CLI invocation, no
# keel_build_cold's 9451 ms sits within 6% of its 10000 ms budget; if the
# runner fleet's variance trips the gate without a compiler change, that is
# the signal to right-size the corpus or budget via KDR, not to widen silently.
